excludedSources: Google Images, random web results, social media, third-party blog/news pages, unrelated outlet imagery, logo/banner-only assets, tiny images, maps, renders, illustrations, product-only images, food-only images, and event-only images were excluded.
General operator image-modification notices were not used as automatic exclusions when the image itself was official/operator outlet-environment media.
reviewSummary.sourceStrategy: Only official/operator website pages and same-domain or official CDN image URLs referenced by those pages were used. No images were downloaded or imported. All targetAssetPath values use official overlay filenames and do not overwrite existing hero.webp, gallery1.webp, gallery2.webp, or gallery3.webp.
